overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character traversing a post-apocalyptic wilderness trail. The character approaches and passes through a fortified encampment with wooden barricades and campfires, set against a backdrop of rocky mountains and coniferous forests, eventually crossing a shallow stream.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wilderness trail through coniferous forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wide dirt trail toward a rocky mountain formation, weapon slung on back

entered.detail: wide dirt path with tire tracks and patches of grass
dense pine trees covering the hillside
dense pine trees covering the hillside
large jagged rock outcrop ahead on the trail
brownish dry vegetation lining the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide dirt trail through a coniferous forest, approaching a rocky mountain formation. The path is flanked by dry grass and bushes under a partly cloudy afternoon sky with natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified encampment corridor with wooden spike barriers

events.description: enters narrow corridor formed by wooden spike fortifications and rock walls
passes active campfire and hanging remains within the encampment

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow fortified passage with wooden barricades on both sides, passing an active campfire

entered.detail: tall wooden spike barriers forming defensive walls
diamond-shaped yellow road sign on a metal pole
active burning fire with orange flames against the rock wall
entrance gate made of logs and wooden beams
tall dark rock formations enclosing the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow fortified corridor made of wooden spikes and barricades between rocky cliffs. An active campfire burns to the right as the character passes through the post-apocalyptic encampment, with the path enclosed by defensive wooden structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with stream crossing

events.description: exits the fortified encampment into open valley with snow-capped mountain view
character steps from dirt trail into shallow stream water

agents.ego_description: exiting the fortified camp and walking toward a stream, eventually stepping into the shallow water

entered.detail: distant mountain peak with white snow visible against the sky
shallow water flowing across the path with visible rocks beneath
large gray boulders lining the stream edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the fortification, the character emerges into an open valley with a snow-capped mountain visible in the distance. The character continues along the trail and steps into a shallow stream surrounded by large rocks and coniferous forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wild coniferous forest through a fortified outpost and into an open mountain valley. It begins with the character walking along a wide dirt trail flanked by dry grass and bushes under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a fortified corridor of wooden spikes and barricades nestled between rocky cliffs, passing an active campfire within the encampment. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the defensive structures into an expansive valley with a distant snow-capped mountain. Finally, the trail leads the character away from the fortifications and into a shallow stream surrounded by large rocks and dense forest.
